positive: A vibrant, retro-futuristic nebula formed by tropical foliage and bioluminescent glowing fauna. Central composition features a stylized, symmetrical geometric arrangement of Monstera leaves intertwined with neon-colored tropical flowers (hibiscus, birds of paradise). The overall scene should have a strong silhouette against a deep midnight blue/teal background. Use complementary colors: vibrant lime green, electric magenta, and deep cyan. Style: Atomic Age illustration meets Art Deco poster design. High contrast, clean vector look, suitable for single-color screen printing or screen printing effect. Intricate patterns, smooth gradients, bold lines. Highly detailed, symmetrical.
negative: blur, artifacts, noise, text, watermark, logo, signature, blurry, low detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, jpeg artifacts, messy, realistic photography, clutter, indistinguishable, cropped, ugly
